identifier.description: Canonical, immutable game identity resolved by the server: Mojang UUID (java), XUID (bedrock) or SteamID64 (steam).

name.description: Last known display name for the identity (cache used to build the whitelist/ops and for the UI).

access.description: Barrier tier: `host` (always in + their presence lets guests join), `member` (always in), `guest` (only in while a host is online).

privileged.description: Whether the identity becomes op/admin on the server.
